title: Death Note: Reborn
description: Mod based on Japanese anime 'Death Note'
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe72dfcd38c760e61f15da1e55f1e571214aa5ce.webp)
⚠️ Note: This version is for development and testing purposes only. Not intended for regular gameplay.

**Current Features**
- Death Note can be obtained from treasure chests by following a Treasure Map, which is purchasable from a Cartographer Villager (minimum Journeyman level).
- Death Note Stand can be used to display the Death Note (Right-click to add/remove, Shift + Right-click to open/close – displays names!).
- Players can switch between pages seamlessly (infinite pages).
- Targeted entities will die from a heart attack after four seconds.
- During this time, a glowing effect and particles are displayed on the target entity, visible only to the Death Note user.

**Planned Features**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Shinigami Realm**
Explore a mysterious new dimension featuring dungeons, unique entities, challenging bosses, and an eerie fog mechanic to set the mood.

**Shinigamis and Their Death Notes**
Encounter Shinigamis, each carrying their own Death Notes with unique properties.

**Custom Name System**
Add a personal touch by customizing the names in your Death Note for immersive storytelling.

**Karma System**
Introduce morality into gameplay with a Karma system, adapted from the core mod, affecting your interactions and outcomes.

**Shinigami Eyes**
Unlock the ability to see the names and lifespans of entities around you, just like in the original series.

**Custom Death Causes**
Add variety to executions with custom death causes, complete with visual renders and unique effects for each cause.

**Reaping Pages of the Death Note**
Discover and use reaping pages to enhance the Death Note's functionality and unleash new gameplay possibilities. 

</details>

🎮 Official Discord: https://discord.gg/KmPrCyhdCs
